name: High-Octane Mixture
description: Adds 12% engine thrust and increases acceleration, but slightly decreases durability due to compression stress.

name: Intake Polishing
description: Reduces drag coefficient by 6% and improves horizontal cruise speed without weight penalties.

name: Lightweight Stripping
description: Slashes aircraft mass by 8%, improving climb rate and initial turn rate significantly, but decreases max durability.

name: Reinforced Alloys
description: Improves overall structural durability by 20% and slightly decreases wing drag, but adds 5% total mass.

name: Over pressured Belts
description: Maximizes firearm energy. Slightly elevates weapon spread but increases standard structural tearing damage.

name: Polished Gun Mounts
description: Precision-aligned gun mounts reduce wing aerodynamic interference, increasing aileron authority by 10%.
